title: Android Release Pipeline Hotfix
notes:
Android Release Pipeline Hotfix

- Fixed release automation so tag pushes trigger both Windows and Android release lanes.
- Android CI now builds and uploads a launcher APK release asset automatically.
- Desktop user behavior remains unchanged while mobile delivery is now automated.
notesList: Fixed release automation so tag pushes trigger both Windows and Android release lanes.
Android CI now builds and uploads a launcher APK release asset automatically.
Desktop user behavior remains unchanged while mobile delivery is now automated.
